_README: This is a SAMPLE ranger_state.json. It is not read by any script — it exists
purely as documentation. Every top-level field that run.mjs reads or writes
is shown below with one or two illustrative entries so a person or AI agent
can quickly see the schema and example values.
Real numbers: pledge / fixedCost / stakeAda are in WHOLE ADA (not lovelace).
margin is a fraction (0.01 = 1%). ROA / luckZ values are floats.
Fields whose 'Who sets it' column in HOW_TO_RUN.md says 'Agent only' are
managed by run.mjs — do not edit them by hand in the real file.
See HOW_TO_RUN.md → 'Complete ranger_state.json reference' for full docs.

discoveryConfig._comment: Optional. Omit the whole block to use all defaults shown.

currentDelegations._comment_for_currentDelegations: Agent-managed. Keyed by bech32 poolId. One entry per pool currently receiving Pool Ranger stake. stakeAda is the snapshot amount that became active at activeFromEpoch.

inFlightChanges._comment: Admin-edited. One entry per submitted-but-not-yet-active tx. changeType is ADD or WITHDRAW.

completedChanges._comment: Agent-managed audit trail. Entries from inFlightChanges are auto-moved here when activeFromEpoch <= currentEpoch. settledAtEpoch is added at migration time.

poolLuckHistory._comment_for_poolLuckHistory: Agent-managed. One entry per evaluated pool. observations[] grows by one item per run; oldest entries are pruned beyond 20. luckZ_windows is non-overlapping 20-epoch slices of the pool's full 73-epoch history; epochsAgo='1-20' is the most recent slice.

poolParamHistory._comment_for_poolParamHistory: Agent-managed. lastSeen is the most recent epoch-boundary snapshot of fee / margin / pledge. changes[] is the permanent log of every detected change. Same-epoch reruns (with --force) do NOT advance lastSeen, so the prior-epoch baseline survives for next-epoch detection.
